error_signature: loop processes fewer items than expected
title: Loop Node not processing all items
symptom: The loop node processes only 61 items instead of the expected 329 items, leading to incomplete data handling.
applies_when: Input data is grouped into multiple items
not_this_if: All items are processed correctly in other workflows
root_cause: The loop node may stop processing if the last iteration returns an empty result. This can happen if the data being processed is not correctly structured or if there are no items to process in the final iteration.
fix_steps: Enable the 'Always output data' option in the loop node settings
Check the output of the previous node to ensure it is not empty
Test the workflow again to see if all items are processed
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always output data' in the loop node settings to ensure it continues processing.
